patch:
--- a/firmware.c
+++ b/firmware.c
@@ -12,12 +12,13 @@
 int  i2c_init(uint8_t bus, uint32_t speed_hz);
 void i2c_deinit(uint8_t bus);
 
-/* Returns number of bytes written, negative on error */
-int  i2c_write(uint8_t bus, uint8_t dev_addr,
+/* BREAKING: Return type changed from int to void; callers checking
+   the return value for byte count or error code will silently lose
+   error information or fail to compile in strict mode. */
+void i2c_write(uint8_t bus, uint8_t dev_addr,
                const uint8_t *data, uint8_t len);
 
-/* Returns number of bytes read, negative on error */
-int  i2c_read(uint8_t bus, uint8_t dev_addr,
+void i2c_read(uint8_t bus, uint8_t dev_addr,
               uint8_t *buf, uint8_t len);
 
 bool i2c_is_device_ready(uint8_t bus, uint8_t dev_addr);
